inputs.prompt:
A magical fairy-tale castle standing on a gentle hill, illuminated softly at night under a starry sky.

Colorful fireworks launch from behind the castle towers, bursting high above and lighting up the sky with sparkling trails.

The castle windows glow warmly, reflecting the fireworks, creating a joyful and enchanting celebration atmosphere.

Smooth cinematic camera movement with a slow upward tilt, revealing the castle and fireworks together.

Rich yet elegant color palette with deep blues, warm golds, and vibrant firework colors, dreamy and festive mood.

Soft magical lighting, gentle particle effects, and subtle sparkles floating in the air.

Cinematic fantasy animation style, highly detailed architecture, smooth lighting and textures.

High resolution, professional color grading, smooth motion.

No text, no logos, no watermarks.
